EmailTemplate.description: Response to customer wishing to retract their cancellation decision.
EmailTemplate.name: Cancellation - Changed Mind
EmailTemplate.subject: Cancellation of your Policy Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge and letting us know your new decision.
Please be informed that your policy will not be cancelled and will stay in place until the expiry date of {!Opportunity.Renewal_Date__c}.
If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact us on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
